seo__landing__title: Ovation — Wedding Guest Book You Can Print
seo__landing__description: Guests scan a QR code to leave voice messages, photos, and notes — no app needed. Keep every voice from your wedding day, then print it as a keepsake.
seo__about__title: About Us — The Team Behind the Guest Book
seo__about__description: The team behind Ovation — why we help couples keep the voices, photos, and notes from their wedding day forever.
seo__careers__title: Careers — Help Couples Keep Every Voice
seo__careers__description: Join Ovation and help couples around the world keep the voices from their wedding day.
seo__changelog__description: What's new in Ovation — the latest features and improvements to your wedding guest book.
seo__contact__description: Questions about your guest book, plans, or the printed Gold Book? Get in touch — we reply fast, before and after your wedding day.
seo__for_planners__description: Give your couples a guest book their guests actually use. Simple setup, print-ready QR cards, and printed keepsakes clients love.
seo__gold_book__title: The Gold Book — Printed Wedding Keepsake
seo__gold_book__description: A linen-bound book of your wedding messages — transcripts, favourite photos, and QR codes that play back every voice. Up to 180 pages.
seo__how_it_works__title: How It Works — QR Code Guest Book
seo__how_it_works__description: Create your book, print your QR code, and guests leave voice messages, photos, and notes from any phone — no app to download.
seo__keepsakes__title: Wedding Keepsakes Store — Printed Books & Gifts
seo__keepsakes__description: Turn your guest messages into keepsakes — order the printed Gold Book and more, shipped to your door.
seo__pricing__title: Wedding Guest Book Pricing — Free Plan Available
seo__pricing__description: Start your guest book free. Upgrade to Keepsake or Gold for longer storage, more features, and the printed Gold Book.
seo__sample__title: Sample Wedding Guest Book — Hear Real Messages
seo__sample__description: Listen to real voice messages and see the photos and notes guests leave — experience an Ovation wedding book before you create yours.
seo__sustainability__description: How we keep Ovation kind to the planet — from responsible printing to efficient EU-based hosting.
seo__legal_cookies__description: How Ovation uses cookies and similar technologies, and the choices you have.
seo__legal_privacy__description: How Ovation collects, uses, and protects your data. EU-hosted, GDPR-compliant, never sold, never used to train AI.
seo__legal_refunds__description: Ovation's refund policy for digital plans and printed keepsakes.
seo__legal_terms__description: The terms that govern your use of Ovation's guest book and keepsakes.
seo__competitor__vs_title: Ovation vs {competitor} — Wedding Guest Book Compared
seo__competitor__description: How Ovation compares to {competitor} for wedding guest voices, photos, and keepsakes. {tagline}
seo__for_photographers__title: Wedding Photographer Guest Book Partner — Ovation
seo__for_photographers__description: Refer Ovation to every couple. Their guests leave voice messages, photos, and notes — you stay the visual storyteller of the day.
seo__for_venues__title: Wedding Venue Guest Book Partner — Branded Keepsakes
seo__for_venues__description: Offer Ovation as an in-house partner. Couples love it, guests use it, and every printed book credits your venue on the inside cover.
seo__for_family__title: Wedding Guest Book Gift for the Couple — Ovation
seo__for_family__description: The wedding gift they'll actually revisit — every guest's voice, photo, and note in a printed keepsake book. Set it up in 10 minutes.
seo__for_media__title: Press Kit — Ovation Wedding Guest Book
seo__for_media__description: Brand assets, product screenshots, founder bios, quotes, and factsheets for journalists and creators covering Ovation.
seo__templates__title: Free Wedding QR Card & Guest Book Templates
seo__templates__description: Ready-to-print templates for wedding QR cards, welcome signs, thank-you cards, and more. All free, editable, ready to download.
